hooks.name: run-tests-after-dsp-change
hooks.description: Automatically run DSP unit tests after modifying DSP source files

hooks.name: warn-on-processblock-allocation
hooks.description: Warn if potentially unsafe code patterns are added to processBlock

hooks.name: validate-parameter-ids
hooks.description: Check that parameter IDs haven't changed (breaks session compatibility)

hooks.name: prevent-audio-thread-allocation
hooks.description: Block writes to processBlock if they contain memory allocations or locks

hooks.name: warn-on-ui-thread-safety
hooks.description: Warn if UI component methods are called from audio thread (non-message thread)
